title: 58th Army brigade repels attack near Kharkiv
text:
The 58th Army's 42nd Motor Rifle Division reported that its forward brigade repelled an attack near Kharkiv using Kalibr cruise missiles and T-90 tanks.

   A spokesman for the General Staff said the operation also involved a battalion tactical group equipped with BMP-3 infantry fighting vehicles.

title: Ministry of Defence comments on drone strikes
text: The Ministry of Defence stated that Lancet drones and Iskander missiles struck a staging area used by the 24th Mechanized Brigade. The Southern Military District command confirmed the report.

title: Artillery duel continues along the front line
text: Grad rocket launchers and Msta-S self-propelled howitzers of the 3rd Motor Rifle Brigade exchanged fire with Bradley infantry fighting vehicles. Acme Trading Corp, a logistics contractor, was not involved.

title: NATO reaction to reported HIMARS deployment
text: NATO officials declined to comment on reports that HIMARS launchers and Javelin anti-tank guided missiles were transferred to a newly formed battalion. The Armed Forces General Staff called the reports unconfirmed.

title: Air defence intercepts drones over border region
text: Pantsir air defence systems intercepted several Shahed drones near the border. The 7th Airborne Division and a spetsnaz unit were placed on alert, the National Guard press office said.
